overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along a wooden restaurant patio with vine-covered pergola, descending stairs to a busy Los Santos street, and continuing along a commercial boulevard with heavy traffic, billboards, and palm trees in warm afternoon light.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered wooden restaurant patio with vine-covered pergola overhead. The deck features outdoor bar seating along a metal railing overlooking the street below, with a lattice-patterned building wall on the left.

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered area onto an open deck with a vibrant turquoise mural wall on the left. The camera approaches and descends a wide concrete staircase to street level, where pedestrians gather near the busy road.

segments.scene_description: At street level on a concrete sidewalk next to a busy multi-lane road with heavy traffic. The camera walks past a retaining wall and urban apartment buildings while motorcycles and cars pass by on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial boulevard with billboards and palm trees

events.description: entering commercial area with large digital billboards and palm trees

agents.ego_description: continuing along the commercial sidewalk observing traffic and surroundings

segments.scene_description: Walking along a commercial boulevard lined with palm trees and large digital billboards. The sidewalk runs alongside parked cars and various commercial buildings in a sunny urban setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a secluded, shaded restaurant patio down into the bustling energy of a sunny Los Santos commercial boulevard. It begins under a vine-covered pergola on a wooden deck, passing outdoor bar seating and a lattice-patterned wall. As the camera exits the covered area, the scene opens onto a deck featuring a vibrant turquoise mural before descending a wide concrete staircase to the street level. The perspective then shifts to a concrete sidewalk where the camera moves past urban apartment buildings and a retaining wall amidst the noise of heavy traffic and passing motorcycles. Finally, the environment expands into a wide commercial boulevard lined with towering palm trees and large digital billboards under the bright afternoon sun.
